tasks.instruction: Wybierz poprawna odpowiedz A, B lub C.

items.stem: If she _________ the manager before the deadline, the contract would never have been signed.
"Why is Tom so upset?" -- "He _________ have overheard what we said about his presentation."
I wish the council _________ the old library last year. It was a beautiful building.
If it _________ for the paramedics' quick response, the climber might not have survived.
"Do you think Sarah passed the driving test?" -- "She _________ have done -- she looked really cheerful afterwards."
If only the government _________ more in renewable energy, we wouldn't be facing such severe pollution now.
